# FlowMCP Specification v4.0.0 — Sample Medium-Grade File

This file is missing the Conformance Language reference, which is an RFC-001 error. It also has a lowercase "must" in a normative context and a style-filler phrase, plus a non-canonical cross-reference.

---

## Schema Format

A schema must export a `main` constant.

We must remember that this is just a fixture for testing.

The schema must always include tests. Tools must have a description.

The `main` block MUST contain at least one of `tools`, `resources`, `prompts`, or `selections`. Tools MUST have a unique identifier.

For more details, see Skills doc and the validation rules.
